title: 4smile Self Adhesive Hooks - 5 Pieces in Black - Extra Strong Stick on Hooks Heavy Duty - No Drilling Sticky for Hanging on Wall or Door for Heavy Duty, Coat Hanger
features: 5-PIECE SET SELF ADHESIVE HOOKS - The waterproof stick on hooks are easily mounted. Practical double-hook design for versatile use, optimised size ensures flexibility. Load capacity up to 13 lbs.

CAN BE USED FOR MANY PURPOSES - The practical double-hook design of the wall hooks allows versatile use. Sticky hooks for hanging large and small objects together on one hook; space-saving organisation.

SUITABLE FOR MOUNTING IN NARROW SPACES - The sticky hooks are perfect for hallway, bathroom, as bedroom accessories; can be used in tight spaces due to their optimised size. Hook shape for hanging many different items.

PERFECT TO USE IN BATHROOM - The door hooks self-adhesive are rust-free and durable, the adhesive pads are waterproof and extra strong. Hooks for hanging heavy-duty items as towels or bathrobes; load capacity up to 6 kg (13 lbs).
EASY TO INSTALL - The sticky hooks can be attached without drilling. They stick to all smooth surfaces and can be removed without leaving a trace.
description: Product Description Double hook design 4smile Extra Strong Adhesive Hooks, Stainless Steel, Set of 5, Black The set contains 5 self-adhesive coat hooks that can be mounted without drilling. The waterproof rust-proof wall hooks with double hook design can hold up to 6 kg, and can hang small and large items at the same time. Ideal for hallway, bathroom, kitchen or bedroom. See More
